title: A CRISPR Competition Assay to Identify Cancer Genetic Dependencies
author: Vishruth Girish
license_note: PMC full-text XML — Bio-protocol — CC-BY confirmed in article XML

steps.instruction: After official publication of our protocol in Bio-protocol ( https://bio-protocol.org/e3682 ) we noted an error in the protocol. In the Materials and Reagents section, the catalog number of VSVG plasmid is "98286", which is completely wrong. Correct catalog number of VSVG plasmid is "12259". Accordingly, we have now corrected as follows: 12. VSVG plasmid (Addgene, catalog number: 12259)
